_metadata.description: State bond requirements for contractors — update when state laws change
_metadata.source: State licensing board regulations and surety bond industry data

CA.bid_bond: Typically 10% of bid amount for public works
CA.performance_bond: 100% of contract amount for public works over $25,000

TX.bid_bond: 5-10% of bid amount for public works

FL.contractor_license_bond: Not required at state level; varies by county
